is_result.generated_code:
def compute_signals(bars: list, params: dict) -> list:
    n = len(bars)
    if n == 0:
        return []
    
    closes = [float(b.get("close", 0)) for b in bars]
    highs = [float(b.get("high", 0)) for b in bars]
    lows = [float(b.get("low", 0)) for b in bars]
    volumes = [float(b.get("volume", 0)) for b in bars]
    
    fast = params.get("fast", 18)
    slow = params.get("slow", 63)
    adx_period = params.get("period", 16)
    atr_period = params.get("period", 16)
    ema_period = params.get("period", 16)
    
    ema_fast = ta_ema(closes, fast)
    ema_slow = ta_ema(closes, slow)
    adx = ta_adx(highs, lows, closes, adx_period)
    atr = ta_atr(highs, lows, closes, atr_period)
    
    signals = [0] * n
    confirm_bars = 1
    long_count = 0
    short_count = 0
    
    for i in range(max(slow, adx_period, atr_period), n):
        close_i = closes[i]
        ema_fast_i = ema_fast[i]
        ema_slow_i = ema_slow[i]
        adx_i = adx[i]
        atr_i = atr[i]
        
        ema_cross = ema_fast_i - ema_slow_i
        
        market_filter = adx_i > 15 and atr_i > 0.001 * close_i
        
        if not market_filter:
            long_count = 0
            short_count = 0
            continue
        
        long_signal = ema_cross > 0 and adx_i > 20 and atr_i > 0.0015 * close_i and close_i > ema_slow_i
        short_signal = ema_cross < 0 and adx_i > 20 and atr_i > 0.0015 * close_i and close_i < ema_slow_i
        
        if long_signal:
            long_count += 1
            short_count = 0
        elif short_signal:
            short_count += 1
            long_count = 0
        else:
            long_count = 0
            short_count = 0
        
        if long_count >= confirm_bars:
            signals[i] = 1
        elif short_count >= confirm_bars:
            signals[i] = -1
    
    return signals
